query: What's blocking the homepage rebuild and what's blocking the roadmap proposal?
answer:
Based on my search, here are the current blockers:

For the **homepage rebuild**:

*   **FeatureGrid component**: The `FeatureGrid` component's responsive layout for tablets needs to be fixed [task:151].
*   **Accessibility audit**: The accessibility audit is blocked until the `FeatureGrid` pull request is merged [note:chat:9].
*   **Performance fix**: A fix for slow homepage loading on mobile Safari is waiting for the design system migration, which includes the new `FeatureGrid` component [task:155].

For the **roadmap proposal**:

*   **Interview synthesis**: The proposal is blocked until the synthesis of user interviews and competitor analysis is complete. This is needed to provide evidence for the proposed bets [task:162, chat:dm:28, note:chat:9]. The target for completion is the end of Sprint 1 [chat:pm:16].

matches.title: Build Hero + FeatureGrid in design system v3
matches.snippet:
<workspace_content>
Build Hero + FeatureGrid in design system v3 🧾 Summary Implement Hero and FeatureGrid components in @genos/design-system v3 with Storybook coverage. These two compose the homepage rebuild and are reused across the pricing and about pages. ✅ Acceptance criteria Hero supports...
</workspace_content>

chunks.text:
<workspace_content>
Build Hero + FeatureGrid in design system v3
🧾 Summary Implement Hero and FeatureGrid components in @genos/design-system v3 with Storybook coverage. These two compose the homepage rebuild and are reused across the pricing and about pages. ✅ Acceptance criteria Hero supports image, video, and illustration variants via a single `media` prop. FeatureGrid is responsive 1 / 2 / 3 columns without per-component media queries — uses CSS container queries via design-system tokens. Storybook stories cover every variant plus the loading and empty states. axe-core passes on every Storybook story. 🎯 Notes & links Hero is mostly done — Carol's illustration is wired in behind a feature flag while the team reviews. FeatureGrid still needs the 3-column → 2-column container-query breakpoint sorted out for the iPad landscape case.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Roadmap proposal v1 — top 5 bets for Q3 🧾 Summary Write the v1 roadmap proposal: five concrete bets for Q3 with an expected outcome, evidence link, and rough effort estimate. Optimized for leadership review and prioritization debate. ✅ Acceptance criteria Five bets, each ≤ 300...
</workspace_content>

chunks.text:
<workspace_content>
Roadmap proposal v1 — top 5 bets for Q3
🧾 Summary Write the v1 roadmap proposal: five concrete bets for Q3 with an expected outcome, evidence link, and rough effort estimate. Optimized for leadership review and prioritization debate. ✅ Acceptance criteria Five bets, each ≤ 300 words. Each bet cites at least one interview quote AND one competitor data point. Rough sizing (S / M / L / XL) and lead-team identified per bet. Reviewed with leadership in a 60-minute working session. 🎯 Notes & links Top candidate bets so far: (1) proactive surfacing assistant, (2) sprint-board polish based on Linear teardown, (3) onboarding overhaul, (4) admin / SSO maturity for enterprise, (5) public API. Order will change as synthesis lands.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Holding the proposal draft until the synthesis lands so the evidence column isn't empty.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Synthesis target: Thursday. Should give you the long weekend to draft.
</workspace_content>

matches.title: Investigate slow homepage load on mobile Safari
matches.snippet:
<workspace_content>
Investigate slow homepage load on mobile Safari 🐞 Summary Reports of 4-6s homepage load times specifically on iOS Safari 16 and 17. Same network, Chrome on the same device loads in ~1s. 🔁 Steps to reproduce Open Safari on iPhone running iOS 16.5 or later. Navigate to...
</workspace_content>

chunks.text:
<workspace_content>
Investigate slow homepage load on mobile Safari
🐞 Summary Reports of 4-6s homepage load times specifically on iOS Safari 16 and 17. Same network, Chrome on the same device loads in ~1s. 🔁 Steps to reproduce Open Safari on iPhone running iOS 16.5 or later. Navigate to https://genos.app/ on a 4G connection. Observe the time-to-interactive in Safari's web inspector. 🎯 Expected behavior Homepage should be interactive in under 2.5s on mobile, matching what Chrome on the same device shows. 💥 Actual behavior Time to interactive lands at 4.2–6.1s. The waterfall shows a long blocking task during parse — likely related to the legacy Bootstrap CSS still being shipped. Memory usage also spikes well above the budget. 🧪 Environment Safari 16.5 and 17.0 on iPhone 12 and iPhone 14. 4G network throttled in Safari dev tools. Confirmed reproducible on staging and production.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
Initial profiling points at the Bootstrap CSS bundle. Once we land the design-system migration this likely fixes itself, but we should confirm with a perf trace after the cutover.
</workspace_content>

<workspace_content>
QA can rerun the trace on the staging build once the migration is in.
</workspace_content>
